caveat: Real RDP-transported pixels + input, but NOT Citrix ICA/HDX, NOT the aardwolf transport, and the drift is simulated-on-a-real-session (not WAN capture).

environment.note: aardwolf (the product's Windows-RDP transport) cannot connect to Linux RDP servers; see fixture README. The aardwolf-over-Windows transport is qualified separately in benchmark/rdp (PR #142).
environment.surface: Tk kiosk app served over RDP; observed on client display

oracle: docker exec cat of the kiosk-persisted note file
task: record->compile->replay a patient-note write through the vision-only resolver ladder over a real RDP round-trip, with no structural backend; confirm the write via an independent document oracle; and halt under injected DPI/theme/JPEG drift

trials.effect_expected: MRN A1001	followup in two weeks

trials.drift: downscale_0.4x_blur + theme_invert + jpeg_q8 (simulated on real session)
